manufacturing_target.preferred_pilot_vendor: JLCPCB Standard PCBA first because ESP32-S3-WROOM-1U-N8R8 is Standard-only in JLC; PCBWay as sourcing/DFM fallback
manufacturing_target.assembly_policy: single-side SMT assembled by PCBA vendor; J2/J3 Molex Micro-Fit 3.0 4-circuit connector interfaces must be populated by THT/vendor or secondary operation

non_negotiables: native wheel controls must keep working in healthy passthrough mode
LIN TX defaults disabled when MCU is reset, blank, booting, unarmed, or faulted
physical arm gate required before any active/passthrough TX
bottom-side pogo pads for programming and test
external 2.4GHz antenna path for Rev A
blocked_until: exact ESP32-S3 module footprint verified against Espressif land pattern
TJA1021 mode/default-state circuit reviewed against NXP datasheet
support-part LCSC/JLCPCB supplier IDs verified before quote; first paid JLC order used 23/23 matched SMT rows
automotive protection BOM checked against assembler availability
LM5164 RON/frequency, ripple network, inductor, capacitor, and EN/UVLO values verified with TI calculator/WEBENCH before production release

MASS ORDER BLOCKER: mass ordering is blocked until the D4/L1 post-order package mismatch is closed for production: D4 package-supplier lock rechecked and L1 SRU5016-100Y/C5760316 either proves thermal/current margin in bench data or is replaced with a higher-current production inductor/footprint
ESP32-S3 module footprint manually compared against Espressif land pattern
bench dual-LIN passthrough wiring validated with two transceivers
known_non_blocking_first_article_followu: First JLCPCB Standard PCBA order placed 2026-06-01 for 5 assembled boards; total paid was $153.71 and file review was pending at order creation.
100x56mm board preserves both connector interfaces and reduces board area versus the original 100x60mm package; further compact cost-down remains a separate layout iteration
70x42mm compact attempt was not DRC-clean; compact layout needs a deliberate placement/routing iteration

J2/J3 are populated Molex Micro-Fit 3.0 4-circuit service connectors with pin 3 reserved to match the Tesla-documented 4-cavity VBAT/GND/NC/LIN interface; exact Tesla OEM connector mate remains an adapter-pigtail physical-inspection follow-up
DNP LIN master pullup/diode footprints are present; populate only on the channel where this board intentionally commands an isolated LIN segment
